chapter_title.en: Chapter 17 – What are rejected, from the witnesses

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/249)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/249)
text: أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( صلوات الله عليه ) كَانَ لَا يَقْبَلُ شَهَادَةَ فَحَّاشٍ وَ لَا ذِي مُخْزِيَةٍ فِي الدِّينِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> did not used to accept the testimony of a shameful, nor of one disgraced in the Religion’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfaliy from al-Sakuniy who has narrated the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that ’Amir al-Mu’minin, Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would not accept the testimony of persons of offensive manners and those humiliated by law.”
